DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT AS TO DEFT MICHELLE LAU (AN INDIVIDUAL) & DBA TUNG AND LAU ACUPUNCTURE ONLY

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT STATES THAT THE REGISTER OF ACTION INDICATES THAT A DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WAS FILED 12/23/2003. HOWEVER, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT MICHELLE LAU'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: DENIED; TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT EXISTS RE: WHETHER LAU'S TREATMENT AGGRAVATED PLAINTIFF'S INJURY. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437C(G) OR ADVISE THE COURT THAT THE MOTION IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-29-2003 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2003 Advanced From Jan-02-04 To Dec-29-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-29-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. The Court states that the Register of Action indicates that a dismissal of the entire action was filed 12/23/2003. However, The Court adopts its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT MICHELLE LAU'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: DENIED; triable issue of fact exists re: whether Lau's treatment aggravated Plaintiff's injury. Prevailing party is to prepare an order pursuant to CCP 437c(g) or advise the Court that the motion is off calendar. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
